response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Individual Contributor with strong backend and distributed systems skills, but he completely lacks the executive engineering leadership, team scaling background, and deep production multi-agent AI experience required for a CTO role at a fintech scale-up.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) at re:cinq.
Prior baseline experience in the fintech sector from his tenure at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience and has no track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Missing deep architectural experience with production-grade, stateful multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes financial environments.
No evidence of managing outsourced delivery partners or establishing enterprise-grade compliance and governance frameworks.
